titleStmt.title: SII 28.270: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 270. (A.R. No. 424 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, central shrine, south base of the maṇḍapa in front.

Records a royal grant, to take effect from the month of Vaikāśi of the year quoted, of the village Alampaḷam in Magadai-maṇḍalam as mudal-aḍaṅgāiṟai-ili along with the (right to collect and appropriated) the several taxes (kaḍamai) including poṉvari and the other āyams (cesses) (in that village) excluding however, from the purview of the grant the dēvadāṉas and tiruviḍaiāṭṭam (in this village) belonging to the Nāyaṉmār (temples/deties) of this and other ūrs., iṟai-ili (tax free land) belonging to brahmins (bhaṭṭar) and to others (who had been given land grant (bhūdāṉam and paḷḷichchandam (land belonging to non-Hindu religious establishments) for the conduct of the service called Kōdaṇḍarāman-sandhi, named after that of the king, a festival with the procession of the deity terminating on the day of his (the kings) birth-asterism and maintenance of the premises of the temple (tiruppaṇi) of Tirukkāmīśvaramuḍaiya-nāyaṉār, the God of Āṟagaḷūr. The order to this effect was addressed to the tāṉattār of the temple. It has been attested by Iḷāṉguḍi-uḍaiyāṉ and Kāliṅgarāyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanacakravatti koṉeriṉmel koṇṭāṉ Āṟakaḷur Uṭaiyār tirukāmicuramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyil tāṉattārkku Innāyaṉārkku nammuṭaiya perāl kodaṇḍarāmaṉ cantikkum tirunāḷukkum tiruppaṇikkum Uṭalāka makatai maṇṭalattil Alampaḷam nāṉkellaikkuḷppaṭṭa nañcey
puncaiyilum Ivvūr nāyaṉmārkkum puṟavūr nāyaṉmārkkum tevatāṉam tiruviṭaiyāṭṭam paṭṭarkaḷ Iṟaiili paḷḷiccantam pūtāṉam yiṟaiyili niṅkalāka patinmuṉṟāvatu vaikāci māta mutal poṉvariyuḷḷiṭṭa pala kaṭamai Aṉaittāyamuṭpaṭa mutalaṭaṅkal Iṟaiyiliyāka cantrā
tittavaraiyum celvatāka tantom Ippaṭikku Ivvūr nāṉkellaiyilum tiruccūlastāpaṉamum paṇṇivittuk kallilum cempilum veṭṭi nammuṭaiya perāl cantiyum Āṭṭaippiṟanta nāḷile tirunāḷum Eḻuntaruḷap paṇṇivittut tiruppaṇiyum ceyvittup po
tuka Ivai Iḷāṉkuṭi Uṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāliṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu tiruveḻuttu tulyam § yāṇṭu patinmuṉmuṉṟāvatu 3 1000 100 9 100
Digital edition of SII 28.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
